message:
test(core): property-based tests for backup module (42 tests)

Covers BackupSchedule parsing (keywords, cron, error cases), display_label,
next_after scheduling math (hourly/daily/weekly/cron), BackupManifest and
BackupStats serde roundtrips, ExportResult/ImportResult serde roundtrips,
ExportOptions/ImportOptions defaults, schedule equality/clone, and
cross-module integration properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
